headline: Autodesk signs strategic collaboration agreement with Amazon Web Services
summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK), a global leader in design and make technology, today announced it has signed a strategic collaboration agreement (SCA) with Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS). Through this collaboration, Autodesk will work with AWS to advance cloud-based solutions that help customers design, build, and operate more efficiently at scale.
